info.description:
Conversation Service

 **Last update**: 08 ene 26, 12:30 p. m.
info.title: Conversation Service

tags.name: Thread
tags.description: The following endpoints are used to create and fetch threads and their messages.

put.description:
**IMPORTANT**: If any property except `smtpId`, `phoneId` or `status` are updated, `canBeUpdated` property will
be saved as **false** regardless of whether in the same request is sent as **true**

patch.summary: Highlight or remove highlight from a message
patch.description: Change the `highlighted` status of a thread message.

requestBody.description: The values to set to the message

highlighted.description: Indicates if the message is highlighted or not

post.summary: Post a message to a thread

requestBody.description: The message to post. Sender object is only required for external senders, not for Janis users.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item. This refer to the `id` of the **User** Entity of **Janis ID Service**. See [User](/v2/service/id#tag/User).

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item. This refer to the `id` of the **User** Entity of **Janis ID Service**. See [User](/v2/service/id#tag/User).

id.description: The id of the default template

topic.description: The topic of the default template

sampleData.description: The information which will be used to replace in the body of the template

userCreated.description: The default template user creator id

userModified.description: The default template user modifier id

isInternal.description: Indicates if the default template is internal

subject.description: The subject of the default template

to.description: The recipient of the default template

cc.description: The cc of the default template

bcc.description: The bcc of the default template

body.description: The body of the default template

to.description: The recipient of the default template

header.description: The header of the default template

body.description: The body of the default template
body.example: Congratulations {{name}} you are now part of Janis

footer.description: The footer of the default template

DefaultTemplateList.description: The list of the default template

entity.description: The entity associated with the message

entityId.description: The entity id associated with the email

content.description:
The content of the message
* Is required when **topic** is empty
content.example: You need to reset your password!

data.description: The information which will be used to replace in the content of the message

useInternalTemplate.description: Indicates if the message was created using an internal template. If true, some fields will not be returned in the response

dateSent.description: The date of the notification was sent

errorMessage.description: Information about the error if the notification failed to send

sendNotification.description: A list of channels to send the notification

items.description: The channel to send the notification

template.description: The template that will be compiled

StringTemplate.description: A string that will be rendered

ArrayTemplate.description: An array of strings that will be rendered

RenderData.description:
The data which will be used to replace in the template

If you need to send a property of type **QR** the name of the same has to start with `qr_`

If you need to send a property of type **Barcode128** the name of the same has to start with `barcode128_`

sampleData.description: The information which will be used to replace in the body of the template

canBeUpdated.description: The indicator of whether the template can be updated automatically, if it is not provided is saved as `true`.

isInternal.description: Indicates if the template is internal

replyTo.description: The reply to of the template

phoneId.description: The Phone Id of the template. This refer to the `id` of the **Phone** Entity of **Janis Conversation-Whatsapp Service**. See [Phone](v2/service/conversation-whatsapp#tag/Phone)

body.example: Congratulations {{name}} you are now part of Janis

smtpId.description: The SMTP id of the template

InternalSender.description: A Janis user that sent a message in a thread

ExternalSender.description: A person that's not a Janis user that sent a message in a thread

highlighted.description: Determines if the message is highlighted, services can use this to increase the visibility of the highlighted messages

isPrivate.description: Indicates whether the message is private (only visible to Janis users) or not (visible by the customer, if there is one related to the thread)

content.example: Welcome to Janis! Your order will be ready by tomorrow.

service.description: The service code related to this thread

entity.description: The entity related to this thread

entityId.description: The entity ID related to this thread

messages.description: The messaged contained in the thread

allOf.description: The first message when creating a thread. Sender object is only required for external senders, not for Janis users.

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

DefaultTemplatesFilters.name: filters
DefaultTemplatesFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

MessageFilters.name: filters
MessageFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

TemplateFilters.name: filters
TemplateFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

ThreadFilters.name: filters
ThreadFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

service.description: The service code related to this thread

entity.description: The entity related to this thread

entityId.description: The entity ID related to this thread
